channel.title: paramiko on Helpful Notes
channel.description: Recent content in paramiko on Helpful Notes

item.title: Automatically Upload Files to Remote Server Using Python
item.author: mailto:dewshrs@gmail.com (Dewan Shrestha)
item.description: If you have your own server like Synology NAS or have access to other servers, you can write a sctipt in python to upload files to your remote server using python package called Paramiko. I was trying to use function directly from Paramiko using SFTP (Secure File Transfer Protocol) client, but I getting error saying Channel is closed. So, I used the scp module from SCP. The code given below is what I used to upload my files to the server using python.
item.dc:creator: Dewan Shrestha

item.title: Automatically Upload Files to Remote Server Using Python
item.author: mailto:dewshrs@gmail.com (Dewan Shrestha)
item.description: If you have your own server like Synology NAS or have access to other servers, you can write a sctipt in python to upload files to your remote server using python package called Paramiko. I was trying to use function directly from Paramiko using SFTP (Secure File Transfer Protocol) client, but I getting error saying Channel is closed. So, I used the scp module from SCP. The code given below is what I used to upload my files to the server using python.
item.dc:creator: Dewan Shrestha
